item.title: Bitsensing Launches 4D Imaging Radar for Autonomous Vehicles
item.description: Bitsensing has released the AIR4D Imaging Radar to advance self-driving vehicle technology with highly detailed environmental sensing.

item.title: Get It Right: Why Lens Selection Makes or Breaks Machine Vision Precision
item.description: Proper lens selection is critical for capturing high-quality images and ensuring overall system accuracy in machine vision, robotics, and factory automation.

item.title: Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) Equipment Market Is Going
item.description: The Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) equipment market is projected to see significant growth, driven by manufacturing quality demands.

item.title: Airy3D Integrates DepthIQ SDK with MediaTek Genio Series
item.description: Airy3D has integrated its DepthIQ SDK with the MediaTek Genio Series, enabling compact and cost-efficient passive 3D vision solutions for embedded AI applications.

item.title: Mitsubishi Electric Develops CNC Error Compensation Digital Twin
item.description: Mitsubishi Electric has developed a new edge-based digital twin technology to correct machining errors in real time on CNC machine tools.

item.title: Flexible AI Inspection: How Learning Systems Are Changing Visual Quality Control
item.description: Learning systems are driving flexible AI inspection, revolutionizing visual quality control in manufacturing.

item.title: NMi Group Expands into Defence and Aerospace Testing with Acquisition of Berlin’s TechnoLab
item.description: NMi Group acquires TechnoLab to expand its testing and certification capabilities into the defense and aerospace sectors.
